sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62210" key="lehla/thsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λεηλ-άτησις</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n62210.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">λεηλασία</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:16:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aen.Tact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
